description_long: This airplane features a sleek, angular fuselage with a digital camouflage pattern, giving it a modern, tactical appearance. The wings are mid-mounted and swept back, with large, dark engine nacelles positioned beneath each wing. The tail section is distinctive, featuring a twin-boom H-tail configuration with two vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, blending smoothly into the body. The landing gear is not visible, suggesting it may be retractable or not modeled. The overall design suggests a futuristic or military-inspired aircraft, optimized for speed and maneuverability.
description: A modern, camouflaged airplane with swept mid-wings, twin-boom H-tail, and prominent underwing engines. The design is sleek and tactical, with an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular fuselage, swept mid-wings, and prominent underwing engines; the twin-boom H-tail is visible.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full wingspan, engine placement, and the symmetrical H-tail configuration.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the streamlined nose, mid-mounted wings, and the twin-boom tail structure.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the dual vertical stabilizers, horizontal stabilizer, and the back of the engine nacelles.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing, swept wings with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted under the wings.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers connected by a horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit integrated into the fuselage.
